hooks.command: echo 'AGRI360 PROCESS REMINDER (docs/CLAUDE_PROCESSES.md § 1): Default pipeline for any code-touching prompt: (1) researcher agent produces a written report, (2) build a TaskCreate task list from it, (3) delegate tasks to dev-frontend + dev-backend in parallel, (4) start the API on localhost and check the affected page(s) via Playwright MCP — re-dispatch fixes if anything looks broken, (5) merge any worktrees back to master, commit with HEREDOC + Co-Authored-By footer, git push origin master, THEN explicitly trigger the Coolify deploy via POST "${COOLIFY_BASE_URL}/api/v1/deploy?uuid=tows08oogko8k4wk84g40oo4" with bearer token from .env — Coolify does NOT auto-deploy on push. Skip ONLY if the prompt is one of: (a) question/status check, (b) docs/spec/process file edit, (c) explicit "do this inline" instruction, (d) research-only/audit request, (e) trivial cosmetic single-file edit.'
